hyperedges.label: HTR Pipeline — Observabilidad y trazabilidad de documentos históricos
Knowledge Bases RAG para corrección y modernización HTR
HTR Cleaning — Detección estructurada en 3 niveles de análisis
HTR Cleaning and Modernization Pipeline (Steps 5-6, HistClean-SpA, Hist2Mod-SpA, hist_clean, clean_modern tables)
Pipeline Observability via Operations Log (principle, table, views, pipeline steps)
HTR Quality Evaluation (metrics, tag schema, descriptive analysis, NLP models)

nodes.label: Estrategia de re-entrada de documentos bloqueados
nodes.rationale: La re-entrada se trata como un nuevo pipeline_run vinculado al run original (parent_run_id) para preservar trazabilidad completa. KB-3 madura iterativamente: corrida 1 = solo GT, corrida N = mayoría clean. Se limita reentry_count en pipeline_config para evitar bucles infinitos.

nodes.label: Arquitectura de observabilidad en tres capas
nodes.rationale: Capa 1: métricas NLP automáticas. Capa 2: trazabilidad por documento. Capa 3: revisión humana y feedback. Cada capa tiene audiencia y frecuencia diferente, separando preocupaciones de CS/ML, infra y anotadores.

nodes.label: Base de datos local como fuente de referencia única
nodes.rationale: Principio de diseño central: toda trazabilidad, métricas, resultados de revisión y estado de documentos viven en la BD local. Elimina fragmentación entre Supabase, BD del Anotador, Google Drive, OneDrive y disco local.

nodes.label: HistClean-SpA: Cleaning Model for Historical Spanish
nodes.rationale: Fine-tunes Mistral-7B-Instruct or Llama-3-8B with QLoRA; combines deterministic pre-processing for predictable HTR artefacts with a custom SentencePiece tokenizer preserving historical graphemes. Addresses the HTR noise barrier before NLP tasks.
nodes.norm_label: histclean-spa: cleaning model for historical spanish

nodes.label: Hist2Mod-SpA: Standardisation Model Historical-to-Modern Spanish
nodes.rationale: Based on mT5-small or ByT5-small; converts early modern Spanish to contemporary form with orthographic, grammatical, and syntactic modernisation under a STRICT tag to preserve meaning.

nodes.label: Decolonial AI for Latin American Colonial Archives
nodes.rationale: Frames colonial archives as repositories of Real Data capturing lived-experience epistemologies. AI as tool of knowledge justice, recovering voices overlooked by modern technology, bridging innovation with cultural responsibility.

nodes.label: Real Data: Colonial Archives as AI Training Resource
nodes.norm_label: real data: colonial archives as ai training resource

nodes.label: QLoRA Fine-Tuning Strategy for Historical Corpora
nodes.rationale: QLoRA enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning of large open-weight LLMs on modest compute, enabling historical domain adaptation at scale without requiring full model training.
